name: Namhae Chemical Corporation
summary: Namhae Chemical Corporation produces and sells agricultural materials in South Korea and internationally. It offers fertilizers, which contain nitrogen, phosphoric acid, and potassium; and basic chemical products, such as ammonia, sulfuric and fuming sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, gypsum, hexafluorosilicic acid, sulphate of potash, and hydrochloric acid for use as basic materials in consumer goods, as well as operates gas stations. The company also exports its products. Namhae Chemical Corporation was founded in 1974 and is based in Yeosu, South Korea.
